# CWE-1051 positive: hard-coded upstream API host (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1051-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1051: Initialization with Hard-Coded Network Resource Configuration Data.
// Vulnerable: billing client always dials fixed private IP 10.20.30.40.

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
)

const billingAPIPure = "http://10.20.30.40:9090/v1/charge"

func ChargeCardPure() http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		if err := r.ParseForm(); err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
		cardToken := r.FormValue("card_token")
		req, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, billingAPIPure, nil)
		if err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
			return
		}
		req.Header.Set("X-Card-Token", cardToken)
		resp, err := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)
		if err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadGateway)
			return
		}
		defer resp.Body.Close()
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.Write([]byte(fmt.Sprintf(`{"status":"%s"}`, resp.Status)))
	}
}
